mechanism_narrative: When FEDFUNDS is pinned near zero while CPIAUCSL stays elevated, markets infer prolonged accommodation and easier financial conditions, which supports equity risk appetite and pushes the 10-year Treasury yield higher over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS <= 0.25% and CPIAUCSL is flat-to-rising versus 3 months ago
failure_condition: Reject if triggered instances produce lower 20d Treasury yields in more than 60% of cases, or if the average 20d yield change is negative despite FEDFUNDS staying near zero.

mechanism_narrative: A rising UNRATE signals weakening labor demand and slower growth expectations, which increases bond safe-haven demand and depresses the 10-year Treasury yield over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by at least 0.2 percentage points from the prior month
failure_condition: Reject if monthly UNRATE increases are followed by positive 20d Treasury yield changes more than 55% of the time, or if the mean 20d yield change is not negative after unemployment rises.

mechanism_narrative: A synchronized acceleration in PAYEMS and RSAFS signals broad domestic demand strength, which raises expected growth and inflation compensation and lifts the 10-year Treasury yield over the next month.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS and RSAFS both rise versus their 3-month averages
failure_condition: Reject if joint PAYEMS-RSAFS upswings are followed by negative 20d yield changes in more than 60% of observations, or if the conditional average yield change is not positive.

mechanism_narrative: A breakout in INDPRO after a weak phase indicates improving industrial supply and firmer real activity, which raises term yields as growth expectations reprice upward over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO rises by more than 0.5% month-over-month after at least two months of stagnation
failure_condition: Reject if INDPRO monthly improvements are not associated with positive 5d or 20d Treasury yield changes, or if the hit rate falls below 50% in rebound episodes.

mechanism_narrative: A housing recovery in HOUST together with stronger GDPC1 implies a broadening demand upswing, which reduces recession risk and lifts the 10-year Treasury yield over a quarterly horizon.
candidate_trigger: HOUST turns up for 2 consecutive months while the latest GDPC1 print is above its previous quarterly pace
failure_condition: Reject if housing-led recoveries are followed by flat or falling 20d yields in more than 60% of cases, or if the 60d yield response is not positive on average.

mechanism_narrative: When CPIAUCSL accelerates while FEDFUNDS remains far below inflation, real policy rates fall further behind the price level, supporting a steeper growth and inflation outlook that pushes the 10-year Treasury yield higher over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL inflation trend is rising and FEDFUNDS stays below 1%
failure_condition: Reject if inflation-up / policy-rate-low episodes do not produce positive 20d yield changes, or if the average yield change is negative across triggered observations.

mechanism_narrative: In a late-cycle labor softening regime, a persistently higher UNRATE combined with slower PAYEMS growth indicates weaker household income momentum and stronger duration demand, which drives the 10-year Treasury yield lower over the next month.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE is above its 6-month average and PAYEMS growth is below its 6-month average
failure_condition: Reject if the combined labor-softening signal fails to predict negative 20d yield changes in at least 55% of triggered cases, or if yield changes are not negative on average.

mechanism_narrative: A synchronized slump in GDPC1, RSAFS, and HOUST identifies a broad demand recession that overwhelms inflation concerns, increases safe-haven buying of Treasuries, and pushes the 10-year Treasury yield lower over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if broad demand contractions are followed by non-negative 60d yield changes in more than 60% of cases, or if the conditional mean yield change is not below zero.
